engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Bug 1 adds Edit/Delete menu items to `ActionButtons.tsx` using existing DS `ActionDropdown` pattern. Other bugs are hook-only fixes with no UI change.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: DS component compliance; visual consistency with existing menu items
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Verify DS ActionDropdown usage matches existing menu item pattern

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Bug 2: float form stays open on success (confirmed). Bug 3: keycard count may lag after Firebase-write reorder. Bug 5: stale override on close failure path.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 3 fix removes optimistic update — UX may lag; plan must decide optimistic-with-rollback vs. remove-optimistic.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Bug 3 UX trade-off resolution required in analysis/plan

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: These fixes are state-machine and error-handling corrections. No auth/authz, no user data exposure, no PII change.
Bug 4: keycard reconcile record has `difference=0` — audit trail is misleading. Bug 3: Firebase errors are silently swallowed.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 3 fix must surface Firebase errors as toast. Bug 4 fix must write correct `difference` value to audit record.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Verify `addKeycardDiscrepancy` + `addCashCount` together give complete audit for keycard reconcile

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: 5 regression TCs required (one per bug). Existing infrastructure: `useTillShifts.test.ts`, `TillReconciliation.test.tsx`, `useTillReconciliationUI.test.ts`. Bug 1 TC needs non-mocked ActionButtons approach.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 1 regression TC cannot be in `TillReconciliation.test.tsx` (ActionButtons is fully mocked there). Needs dedicated ActionButtons test or integration approach.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Test strategy for Bug 1 must be resolved in plan

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Bug 4: `addCashCount("reconcile", 0, 0, ...)` writes incorrect `difference` field. `addCashCount` signature verified: `(type, count, difference, amount, denomBreakdown, keycardCount)`.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Any downstream consumer reading `difference` from keycard reconcile records will currently see 0 — need to check if report consumers exist.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Check if EOD report or other audit consumer reads `difference` from reconcile records

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Bug 3: `recordKeycardTransfer` is async Firebase write with no error boundary. Reordering to await-before-state-update impacts perceived latency.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: UX lag if Firebase write takes >200ms. Plan must accept the latency or implement loading state.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: N/A for planning decision; flag as implementation note

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: All five fixes are pure React hook/component code changes with no schema migration, no Firebase structure change, and no feature flag needed. Rollback = revert commit.

stage_payload.scope_summary: Five confirmed code-level defects in the till reconciliation feature of the reception app (`apps/reception`). All defects were observed during a live audit on 2026-03-13. They span three source files and cover UI-flow gaps, missing error handling, incorrect data writes, and stale state leakage.
goals: Fix all five defects so till reconciliation is fully operational: edit/delete modes reachable, float form closes after success, keycard Firebase writes surface errors, keycard reconcile record is accurate, and shift-close override state is always clean.
Add targeted regression tests for each fix.
non_goals: Redesigning the till reconciliation UX beyond the minimum needed for each fix.
Addressing other till subsystem areas (TillShiftHistory, DrawerLimitWarning, safe management).
constraints: Reception app uses Firebase Realtime DB (not Prisma/Postgres). All write mutations go through custom Firebase hooks.
Tests run in CI only (`docs/testing-policy.md`). NEVER run jest locally.
assumptions: `useTillReconciliationUI.ts` and its test already exist and are passing. New tests should follow the established mocking pattern in `TillReconciliation.test.tsx` and `useTillShifts.test.ts`.

process_topology.note: None: local code path only — these are pure logic/state bugs in the React hook layer. No CI/deploy/release lane, approval path, or multi-step operator runbook is affected by these fixes. The till component tree operates as a self-contained feature within the reception app. Current component topology (for context): - `TillReconciliation.tsx` — composite root; reads state from `useTillReconciliationUI` + `useTillReconciliationLogic` - `ActionButtons.tsx` — renders per-action dropdown buttons (Shift, Cash, Keycards); never activates edit/delete modes - `TransactionModals.tsx` — renders `EditTrans
